title: Memory exhausted
body:
How can I help with this?

```
 Yosys 0.5+     402 (git sha1 a7ffb85, clang 7.0.0 -fPIC -Os)
yosys> read_verilog big_test.v
...
Successfully finished Verilog frontend.
yosys> write_ilang tmp.ilang 

3. Executing ILANG backend.
Output filename: tmp.ilang

yosys> design -reset

yosys> read_ilang tmp.ilang 

4. Executing ILANG frontend.
Input filename: tmp.ilang
ERROR: Parser error in line 247340: memory exhausted
```
code_blocks:

ERROR: Parser error in line 247340: memory exhausted
